title: Place value shifts
summary: Explain how a digit changes value when it moves left or right in a multi-digit number.

title: Read and write whole numbers
summary: Write whole numbers to 1,000,000 in standard, expanded, and word form.

title: Compare and order whole numbers
summary: Plot, compare, and order multi-digit whole numbers up to 1,000,000.

title: Round whole numbers
summary: Round whole numbers to the nearest 10, 100, or 1,000.

title: Compare and order decimals
summary: Plot, compare, and order decimals through the hundredths place.

title: Multiplication facts and related division facts
summary: Recall multiplication facts through 12 and use the related division facts with automaticity.

title: Use place value to multiply
summary: Use place-value reasoning and partial products to represent multi-digit multiplication.

title: Multiply multi-digit whole numbers
summary: Multiply whole numbers up to two digits by two digits with procedural fluency.

title: Divide with remainders
summary: Divide whole numbers and express remainders in context, including as fractions when appropriate.

title: Estimate products and quotients
summary: Use place value and reasoning to estimate multiplication and division results.

title: Decimal tenths and hundredths
summary: Reason about adding or subtracting tenths and hundredths from decimal numbers.

title: Add and subtract decimals
summary: Add and subtract decimals to the hundredths place in real-world situations.

title: Whole-number multiplication and division problems
summary: Solve real-world multiplication and division problems, including interpreting remainders.

title: Add and subtract fractions in context
summary: Solve real-world problems involving addition and subtraction of fractions and mixed numbers with like denominators.

title: Multiply fractions by whole numbers
summary: Solve real-world problems that multiply a fraction by a whole number or vice versa.

title: True or false equations
summary: Determine whether whole-number equations are true or false and explain why.

title: Unknowns in equations
summary: Write and solve multiplication or division equations with an unknown in any position.

title: Factors, prime, and composite numbers
summary: Find factor pairs and determine whether a number is prime, composite, or neither.

title: Generate and describe patterns
summary: Extend numerical patterns and identify the rule that creates them.

title: Equivalent fractions and decimals
summary: Represent tenths and hundredths as equivalent fractions or decimals.

title: Match decimals to fractions
summary: Relate decimals to fraction forms with denominators of 10 and 100.

title: Generate equivalent fractions
summary: Create and identify equivalent fractions using multiplication or division.

title: Compare and order fractions
summary: Compare and order fractions using benchmark fractions and equivalent values.

title: Decompose fractions greater than one
summary: Break fractions greater than one into sums of fractions with the same denominator.

title: Add and subtract fractions and mixed numbers
summary: Add or subtract fractions and mixed numbers with like denominators.

title: Tenths and hundredths together
summary: Add fractions written in tenths and hundredths by rewriting them as equivalent values.

title: Fraction multiplication expressions
summary: Represent multiplying a fraction by a whole number with repeated addition and equations.

title: Select a measurement tool
summary: Choose the most appropriate tool to measure a given attribute.

title: Convert within one measurement system
summary: Convert units of length, weight, capacity, and time within the same measurement system.

title: Elapsed time and measurement contexts
summary: Solve real-world problems involving elapsed time and multi-step measurement situations.

title: Money with decimals
summary: Solve money problems using decimal addition and subtraction to the hundredths place.

title: Classify angles
summary: Identify acute, right, obtuse, straight, and reflex angles.

title: Estimate and measure angles
summary: Estimate, measure, and draw angles in whole-number degrees.

title: Unknown angle measures
summary: Solve angle problems by writing equations for unknown angle measures.

title: Rectangle area and perimeter
summary: Use formulas to find area and perimeter of rectangles and solve related problems.

title: Compare rectangles with area and perimeter
summary: Reason about rectangles that share an area or perimeter but not both.

title: Choose a data display
summary: Select and interpret displays such as line plots for numerical data.

title: Describe center and spread
summary: Determine mode, median, range, and other simple summaries of a data set.

title: Read fraction data from plots
summary: Use data displays to reason about fractional parts of a group.
